texto: The lake was no longer frozen
autor: the complete stillness of the waterwas in stark contrast to what she has just seen only moment ago. On the sideof the lake Rose could see the four figures still there and her fear returned....
explicacao: Citação de the complete stillness of the waterwas in stark contrast to what she has just seen only moment ago. On the sideof the lake Rose could see the four figures still there and her fear returned.... sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The lake was no longer frozen” articula reflexao, tomos-a-roberts, longer em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
